## Branch And Scope

- Source branch:
- Base branch:
- Target branch:
- Changed-file scope:

## Local Validation Evidence

GitHub Actions are optional and non-blocking unless this repo has separately
opted into Actions-authoritative gates. PMT local validation evidence, CStar
validation/result ids, and CStar Console witness receipts/status are the
authority for Corvus validation.
Existing Actions failures must be reported as advisory status only and must not
block PMT/CStar validation unless this repo has separately opted into
Actions-authoritative gates.

- Local validation commands/results:
- CStar validation result id(s):
- CStar Console witness receipt/status:
- GitHub Actions status, if present:

## PMT Review

- PMT reviewer verdict:
- Risk notes:
- Follow-up PR packaging decision, if local exception was used:
- Merge-gated statement: do not merge or publish to main/master until the
  required MM/CoS/CEO merge gate is explicitly granted.

## Checklist

- [ ] Bead id is present and matches the work.
- [ ] GitHub issue is linked, or the approved no-issue exception is stated.
- [ ] Packaging mode is declared.
- [ ] Branch/base/target are listed.
- [ ] Changed-file scope is bounded and reviewed.
- [ ] Local validation commands and results are included.
- [ ] CStar validation/result id(s) are included or explicitly pending.
- [ ] PMT reviewer verdict is included or explicitly pending.
- [ ] MCP status/degraded fallback is included.
- [ ] Risk notes are included.
- [ ] Merge/main publication remains gated.
- [ ] GitHub Actions are treated as optional/non-blocking unless separately
      opted in.
